articles.title: BitMEX Co-Founder Arthur Hayes Predicts Little-Known Altcoin Will Overtake Solana ($SOL)
articles.description: The co-founder of popular cryptocurrency derivatives trading platform BitMEX, Arthur Hayes, has set the cryptocurrency community abuzz with his prediction that Aptos ($APT) will overtake Solana ($SOL) as the second-most prominent Layer 1 (L1) blockchain, behind only Ethereum, within the next two to three years.
